title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage local models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package to use Ollama models as LLM, chat, or embedding backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for any Ollama model; runs entirely in browser or via Docker.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive TUI (text-user-interface) client for Ollama written in Rust; keyboard-driven repl.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns Ollama models into a free local GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template: chunk documents, embed with Ollama, and chat over your data.

title: ollama-hub
summary: Community-curated registry of Modelfiles, tools, and example apps for Ollama.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent builder API, streaming, and Spring Boot starters.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Production-ready Docker Compose stack with Ollama, Open-WebUI, Nginx, and GPU support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node-selector and autoscaling.

title: ollama-chatbot
summary: Next.js starter that exposes a ChatGPT-like interface backed by any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET SDK for Ollama; supports .NET 6+, Blazor samples, and dependency injection.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to run local LLM commands on selected notes via Ollama.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package providing JavaScript/TypeScript bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-pypi
summary: Official PyPI package; install via pip and interact with local Ollama models from any Python script.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that answers users using any Ollama model; slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community-built Rust crate providing async bindings and strong types for the Ollama API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.
